# AnalyzeSession

> Tracks CLI analyze command runs

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| id | uuid | yes | auto | Primary key |
| scriptPath | string | yes | - | Path to the analyzed script |
| status | running \| completed \| failed | yes | running | Session status |
| callCount | integer | yes | 0 | Number of LLM calls captured |
| totalCostUsd | float | yes | 0 | Total cost of all calls in session |
